channel.title: Android Central[RSS+]

channel.itunes:summary:
All the latest content from the Android Central team

https://www.androidcentral.com/rss.xml

All the latest content from the Android Central team

https://www.androidcentral.com/rss.xml

item.title: Google just announced Wear OS 6.1, and it adds a time zone feature I've wanted for years
item.itunes:title: Google just announced Wear OS 6.1, and it adds a time zone feature I've wanted for years
item.itunes:author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.itunes:summary: Wear OS 6.1 can now update time zones based on physical location without network access.
item.description: Wear OS 6.1 can now update time zones based on physical location without network access.
item.content:encoded: Wear OS 6.1 can now update time zones based on physical location without network access.

item.title: Gmail's new AI Inbox is here, but it'll cost you $250 a month
item.itunes:title: Gmail's new AI Inbox is here, but it'll cost you $250 a month
item.itunes:author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.itunes:summary: Gmail's AI Inbox is rolling out to Google AI Ultra users, offering smart email prioritization tools.
item.description: Gmail's AI Inbox is rolling out to Google AI Ultra users, offering smart email prioritization tools.
item.content:encoded: Gmail's AI Inbox is rolling out to Google AI Ultra users, offering smart email prioritization tools.

item.title: AT&T just discounted the Google Pixel 10a to the price of a latte — and for once, the fine print doesn't make my head hurt
item.itunes:title: AT&T just discounted the Google Pixel 10a to the price of a latte — and for once, the fine print doesn't make my head hurt
item.itunes:author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.itunes:summary: Add a line with ANY unlimited plan and T-Mobile will give you a Google Pixel 10a for only $3.99/month.
item.description: Add a line with ANY unlimited plan and T-Mobile will give you a Google Pixel 10a for only $3.99/month.
item.content:encoded: Add a line with ANY unlimited plan and T-Mobile will give you a Google Pixel 10a for only $3.99/month.

item.title: I gave my Meta smart glasses a nose and now they last all day long
item.itunes:title: I gave my Meta smart glasses a nose and now they last all day long
item.itunes:author: Android Central[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary: The BoboVR CG2 charges all of my Meta smart glasses at home and on the go thanks to its 3-in-1 modular design.
item.description: The BoboVR CG2 charges all of my Meta smart glasses at home and on the go thanks to its 3-in-1 modular design.
item.content:encoded: The BoboVR CG2 charges all of my Meta smart glasses at home and on the go thanks to its 3-in-1 modular design.

item.title: Google's authentic Refurbished program grabs Pixel 8a, amid Amazon expansion

item.content:encoded: Google's Certified Refurbished program loops in the Pixel 8a and extends its reach to more consumers on Amazon.

item.content:encoded: Verizon will give you a FREE Galaxy S26 Ultra when you add a line with the Unlimited Ultimate plan. No kidding!

item.title: I found a hidden Pixel feature that explains what's wrong with Bluetooth (and Android Auto)
item.itunes:title: I found a hidden Pixel feature that explains what's wrong with Bluetooth (and Android Auto)
item.itunes:author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)

item.description: Pixel's hidden tool runs tests and suggests fixes like re-pairing or clearing cache.
item.content:encoded: Pixel's hidden tool runs tests and suggests fixes like re-pairing or clearing cache.

item.title: AT&T’s new OneConnect bundle is a great deal you probably can’t have
item.itunes:title: AT&T’s new OneConnect bundle is a great deal you probably can’t have
item.itunes:author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.itunes:summary: AT&T’s OneConnect bundles mobile and fiber into one simple bill with great family pricing, but cuts perks and skips existing customers.
item.description: AT&T’s OneConnect bundles mobile and fiber into one simple bill with great family pricing, but cuts perks and skips existing customers.
item.content:encoded: AT&T’s OneConnect bundles mobile and fiber into one simple bill with great family pricing, but cuts perks and skips existing customers.

item.title: Google finally fixed Gemini for Home so you can stop yelling at your ceiling
item.itunes:title: Google finally fixed Gemini for Home so you can stop yelling at your ceiling
item.itunes:author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.itunes:summary: Google's massive Gemini for Home update finally lets you ditch robotic commands and use natural speech to control your lighting and appliances.
item.description: Google's massive Gemini for Home update finally lets you ditch robotic commands and use natural speech to control your lighting and appliances.
item.content:encoded: Google's massive Gemini for Home update finally lets you ditch robotic commands and use natural speech to control your lighting and appliances.

item.description: Google is aware of the issue and working on a fix.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 firmware leak signals launch is right around the corner

item.itunes:author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.itunes:summary: The Galaxy Watch 9 could be nearly here with a new chip and same design, but while it promises better efficiency, the unchanged battery means daily charging likely isn’t going anywhere.

item.content:encoded: The Galaxy Watch 9 could be nearly here with a new chip and same design, but while it promises better efficiency, the unchanged battery means daily charging likely isn’t going anywhere.

item.title: I used this hidden Google Pay feature to automate credit card bill payments
item.itunes:title: I used this hidden Google Pay feature to automate credit card bill payments
item.itunes:author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.itunes:summary: Google Pay in India has a hidden feature that lets you add all credit card billers, allowing you to pay bills with the utility. This is the CRED alternative I've been waiting for in India.
item.description: Google Pay in India has a hidden feature that lets you add all credit card billers, allowing you to pay bills with the utility. This is the CRED alternative I've been waiting for in India.
item.content:encoded: Google Pay in India has a hidden feature that lets you add all credit card billers, allowing you to pay bills with the utility. This is the CRED alternative I've been waiting for in India.

item.title: YouTube now works with Android Auto, but not in the way you'd expect
item.itunes:title: YouTube now works with Android Auto, but not in the way you'd expect
item.itunes:author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.itunes:summary: Google has added partial YouTube support to Android Auto with new playback controls.
item.description: Google has added partial YouTube support to Android Auto with new playback controls.
item.content:encoded: Google has added partial YouTube support to Android Auto with new playback controls.

item.title: Netflix's latest price hike is here, and I’m struggling to find the value in a $27 4K plan
item.itunes:title: Netflix's latest price hike is here, and I’m struggling to find the value in a $27 4K plan
item.itunes:author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.itunes:summary: Netflix just raised prices again across all plans, and while it’s spending big on content and new features, you’re basically paying more for the same experience.
item.description: Netflix just raised prices again across all plans, and while it’s spending big on content and new features, you’re basically paying more for the same experience.
item.content:encoded: Netflix just raised prices again across all plans, and while it’s spending big on content and new features, you’re basically paying more for the same experience.

item.title: Still paying for cloud storage? This NAS deal will make you reconsider
item.itunes:title: Still paying for cloud storage? This NAS deal will make you reconsider
item.itunes:author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.itunes:summary: Don't want to rely on cloud storage? Now is the best time to get a NAS server and start your local storage journey, and the best starter NAS is down to its lowest price.
item.description: Don't want to rely on cloud storage? Now is the best time to get a NAS server and start your local storage journey, and the best starter NAS is down to its lowest price.
item.content:encoded: Don't want to rely on cloud storage? Now is the best time to get a NAS server and start your local storage journey, and the best starter NAS is down to its lowest price.

item.title: I put a magnetic ring on my non-wireless charging phone — here's why you should too
item.itunes:title: I put a magnetic ring on my non-wireless charging phone — here's why you should too
item.itunes:author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.itunes:summary: Who says your phone needs to support wireless charging for you to use magnetic accessories with it? Magnets let you use more than magnetic wireless chargers.
item.description: Who says your phone needs to support wireless charging for you to use magnetic accessories with it? Magnets let you use more than magnetic wireless chargers.
item.content:encoded: Who says your phone needs to support wireless charging for you to use magnetic accessories with it? Magnets let you use more than magnetic wireless chargers.

item.title: I always add these 6 quick settings tiles to my Android phone when setting it up for the first time
item.itunes:title: I always add these 6 quick settings tiles to my Android phone when setting it up for the first time
item.itunes:author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.itunes:summary: There are dozens of quick settings tiles, but here are my top six. I rely on them so much that they are the first tiles I pick when setting up a new phone.
item.description: There are dozens of quick settings tiles, but here are my top six. I rely on them so much that they are the first tiles I pick when setting up a new phone.
item.content:encoded: There are dozens of quick settings tiles, but here are my top six. I rely on them so much that they are the first tiles I pick when setting up a new phone.
